chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5893 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.30377/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 05.03.2025 Mr.Aqeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the petitioner finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He states that the Department may be directed to finalize the assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action may be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent Department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
